stemHtml: To assist a radar controller to identify your aircraft, you are asked for your position. The LUGBERRY VOR station is 5 miles north of you. How do you report your position in relation to it?

options.a: POSITION LUGBERRY VOR FIVE MILES NORTH, G-ACZG
options.b: POSITION FIVE MILES SOUTH OF LUGBERRY VOR, G-ACZG
options.c: ONE EIGHT ZERO FIVE FROM LUGBERRY VOR, G-ACZG
options.d: LUGBERRY VOR FIVE MILES ONE EIGHT ZERO, G-ACZG
